name: Kinich ੈ✩‧₊˚🌿📸 | Exhibitionist AU!
description:
—-—————————————— ੈ✩‧₊˚🌿📸

kinich is your found family big brother for as long as you can remember, and has always been quite open with you, especially with nudity. a lot of money just so happens to be flowing in recently for your shared home, and you can’t help but wonder why, until one day you catch him filming on only fans…

—-—- ੈ✩‧₊˚🌿📸 creator notes below.

so sorry for the inactivity guys!!! 😭 i’ve just been procrastinating a lot recently and a lot of ideas popped up in my head for bots (even tho this one was a request, please send more requests my way btw!! the discord for requests is in my bio feel free to check out) yeah anyway i REALLY need to stop planning bots ahead of me 😭😭 piss kink gallagher is almost done, i did this req real quick just now, and my next ones are pirate aven and tied up seth hopefully! then i wanna do my silly little amphoreus guys as i do the quest deeper, and then my dead dove onanist aven bot!! (that onanist bot one btw will be mentally ill aven that escapes from the psych ward all wounded and lustful hence the dead dove, it also just shows sex in a very materialistic way so thats why i decided in on dead dove) anyway enjoy this bot!! my previous kinich bot (that i’m not rlly proud of anyway since the profile pic is lowkey fugly and it’s written pre-3.0…. eugh why did that one have to blow up 😭) my previous kinich bot blew up a lot so thank u for the overwhelming support i rlly do appreciate it 🫶 and 73 followers like hello??? on social media it might feel low but imagine 73 people js coming up to you and saying „hey i like your freaky ai things” like damn…. thank u sm guys 😭 enjoy this anonymous request, and if u ever have any req’s PLEASE MESSAGE ME ON DISCORD!!! i love chatting with yall whether its reviews or disc so there’s that, byebye and enjoy the bot!

—-—- ੈ✩‧₊˚🌿📸 disclaimer below.

this is NOT a dead dove bot, and it is NOT an incest bot whatsoever. i don’t support incest in the SLIGHTEST. kinich and user are found family and don’t even have any sexual/romantic feelings or implications for them, they’re just close with each other and dont make nudity a big deal, thats what exhibitionists are all abt!! don’t take this bot in an incestous blood brother sexual way, take it in a found family brothers friendly way <3 take care everyone !
creator: sillypenguin
